extract: Garchomp (Japanese: ガブリアス Gaburias) is a dual-type Dragon/Ground Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It evolves from Gabite starting at level 48. It is the final form of Gible. Garchomp can Mega Evolve into two forms: Mega Garchomp using the Garchompite. Mega Garchomp Z using the Garchompite Z. It is referred to as a pseudo-legendary Pokémon by fans.
